channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump heads to China today for high-stakes meeting with Xi
item.description: Trade, Taiwan and tensions with Iran are surefire topics for President Trump's meeting with Chinese leader Xi Jinping.

item.title: What to know about Trump-Xi summit with trade, Taiwan and Iran on the agenda
item.description: Presidents Xi Jinping and Donald Trump are preparing for a summit, with both China and the U.S. emphasizing stable ties

item.title: Inflation report to show latest prices as fuel costs surge amid Iran war
item.description: The Iran war has ratcheted up prices for gasoline, airfares and other expenses.

item.title: Iran hangs another man as executions increase during war
item.description: Since the start of the war, Iran has ramped up executions, particularly in cases involving alleged espionage or security-related charges.
